rule_metadata.author: Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
rule_metadata.title: UAC Bypass Using IDiagnostic Profile - File

rules.rule_text:
title: UAC Bypass Using IDiagnostic Profile - File
id: 48ea844d-19b1-4642-944e-fe39c2cc1fec
status: test
description: Detects the creation of a file by "dllhost.exe" in System32 directory
  part of "IDiagnosticProfileUAC" UAC bypass technique
references:
- https://github.com/Wh04m1001/IDiagnosticProfileUAC
author: Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
date: 2022-07-03
tags:
- attack.execution
- attack.defense-evasion
- attack.privilege-escalation
- attack.t1548.002
logsource:
  product: windows
  category: file_event
detection:
  selection:
    Image|endswith: \DllHost.exe
    TargetFilename|startswith: C:\Windows\System32\
    TargetFilename|endswith: .dll
  condition: selection
falsepositives:
- Unknown
level: high
